videos.headline: Louisville Cardinals vs. Miami Hurricanes: Full Highlights
videos.description: Louisville Cardinals vs. Miami Hurricanes: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Louisville Cardinals vs. Miami Hurricanes: Full Highlights) 2025/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miller Moss punches in TD on Louisville's opening drive
videos.description: Miller Moss makes a 1 yard rushing touchdown to give the Cardinals their first score of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miller Moss punches in TD on Louisville's opening drive) 2025/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chris Bell gives Louisville an early 14-0 lead
videos.description: Miller Moss connects with Chris Bell who takes it 35 yards to the end zone for the Louisville touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chris Bell gives Louisville an early 14-0 lead) 2025/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mark Fletcher carries it into the end zone for Miami
videos.description: Mark Fletcher scores the 2-yard rushing touchdown and Miami strikes back.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mark Fletcher carries it into the end zone) 2025/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Antonio Watts grabs interception vs. Miami Hurricanes
videos.description: Antonio Watts grabs interception vs. Miami Hurricanes

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Antonio Watts grabs interception vs. Miami Hurricanes) 2025/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jabari Mack picks off Miami Hurricanes
videos.description: Jabari Mack grabs interception vs. Miami Hurricanes

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jabari Mack picks off Miami Hurricanes) 2025/10/17 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Carter Davis kicks 27-yard field goal) 2025/10/17 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Cooper Ranvier makes 48-yard field goal) 2025/10/17 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Carter Davis makes 41-yard field goal) 2025/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bell grabs 2nd TD to give Cardinals double-digit lead
videos.description: Miller Moss finds Chris Bell who takes off for a 36-yard touchdown to extend the Cardinals' lead to 24-13.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bell grabs 2nd TD to give Cardinals double-digit lead) 2025/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miami pulling closer on Malachi Toney's TD
videos.description: Malachi Toney runs to the edge with speed to get Miami back in the Game 24-21.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miami pulling closer on Malachi Toney's TD) 2025/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jojo Evans comes up with an interception
videos.description: Jojo Evans comes up with an interception

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jojo Evans comes up with an interception) 2025/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck's fourth INT seals the win for Louisville
videos.description: In the final minute of the 4th quarter, Louisville picks off Carson Beck for the fourth time to seal the 24-21 victory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck's fourth INT seals the win for Louisville) 2025/10/17 ESHEET
